nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe and produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy. Low around 66, with temperatures rising to around 70 overnight. Southeast wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before noon, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between noon and 1pm. Some of the storms could be severe and produce heavy rain. Partly sunny. High near 78, with temperatures falling to around 75 in the afternoon. West wind 10 to 23 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Clear, with a low around 57. West wind 6 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.

nws.name: Friday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 86. Southwest wind 6 to 13 mph.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 65. South wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely after 7am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 82. West northwest wind 8 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 7pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 1am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 57. North northwest wind 12 to 16 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 78. Northwest wind 10 to 14 mph.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 56. West northwest wind 3 to 12 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 81. West northwest wind 3 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 56. West northwest wind 2 to 9 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 83. Northwest wind 3 to 8 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 60. Southwest wind 2 to 7 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 1pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 90. Southwest wind 3 to 9 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.
